enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

Who are the singers of the song Adada Vaa Asaththalam?

The song is sung by Andrea Jeremiah, Ilayaraaja, and Suvi Suresh.

Who composed the music for the movie Sarvam?

The music was composed by the renowned Yuvan Shankar Raja.

What is the mood of the song?

The song has an energetic and upbeat mood, making it perfect for lively occasions.

Who are the lead actors in the movie Sarvam?

The lead roles are played by Arya and Trisha.

When was the movie Sarvam released?

The movie was released in the year 2009.
enrichedMetadata.summary: The song Adada Vaa Asaththalam from the movie Sarvam, released in 2009, features the lead actors Arya and Trisha. Composed by Yuvan Shankar Raja and penned by lyricist Pa Vijay, this energetic and upbeat track is performed by Andrea Jeremiah, Ilayaraaja, and Suvi Suresh. The song's vibrant beats and lively lyrics make it a perfect choice for celebrations and parties. It captures the essence of joy and enthusiasm, leaving listeners in a cheerful mood.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Adada Vaa Asaththalam from the movie Sarvam is a vibrant and energetic track that showcases the musical brilliance of Yuvan Shankar Raja. Sung by the talented Andrea Jeremiah, Ilayaraaja, and Suvi Suresh, this song is a perfect blend of modern beats and captivating lyrics by Pa Vijay. Dive into this electrifying number that promises to uplift your spirits and set the dance floor on fire.
